project_info.title: Hybrid AI-Driven IDS: Bridging the Gap in Network Threat Detection

outline.title: Hybrid AI-Driven IDS: Bridging the Gap in Network Threat Detection
outline.summary: Introduction to the hybrid AI-driven Intrusion Detection System, its purpose, and developer attribution.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Traditional PCAP Analysis Falls Short Against Modern Threats
outline.summary: Discusses the limitations of traditional PCAP analysis in the face of encrypted traffic, zero-day exploits, and Living Off the Land attacks.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Combining Deterministic Rules with AI for Comprehensive Coverage
outline.summary: Explains the dual-engine architecture that integrates rule-based and AI-driven detection for enhanced visibility.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Rapid & Reliable Detection of Known Attack Patterns
outline.summary: Details the rule-based detection methods for ARP spoofing, port scanning, DNS tunneling, and data exfiltration.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Unsupervised Learning for Novel Threat Identification
outline.summary: Introduces the Isolation Forest model, its focus on flow-level metrics, and its ability to detect novel threats without prior knowledge.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Transforming Raw PCAP Data into Actionable Features
outline.summary: Describes the process of flow aggregation and extraction of key features for AI analysis using `feature_extractor.py`.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Defining "Normal" with Synthetic & Real-World Data
outline.summary: Explains the training methodology using synthetic normal flows and the CSE-CIC-IDS2018 dataset, and the role of `train_ai_model.py`.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Dual Detection of a Synthetic Data Exfiltration Attempt
outline.summary: Presents a concrete example of a data exfiltration scenario detected by both the rule engine and the AI model, including anomaly scores.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: A Unified Pipeline for Comprehensive Threat Detection
outline.summary: Provides a visual overview of the hybrid architecture, highlighting network traffic ingestion, parallel processing, and integrated reporting.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Addressing Challenges and Expanding Capabilities
outline.summary: Discusses current limitations such as encrypted traffic analysis and outlines future plans including live capture, web interface, and advanced AI techniques.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: The Future of IDS: A Synergistic Blend of Rules and AI
outline.summary: Summarizes the key takeaways: moving beyond signatures, resilience against novel threats, cloud-native development, and continuous evolution.
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed

outline.title: Thank You! Questions?
outline.summary: Final slide for attribution to Adrian S. Obungu and contact information (LinkedIn, GitHub).
outline.image_plan: Use a suitable image if needed
